hooks.command: s=$(git submodule status 2>/dev/null | awk '/^-/{print $2}' | tr '\n' ' '); p=$(for x in stow hyprland hyprlock hypridle hyprpaper waybar mako kitty alacritty tmux zsh fzf zoxide eza neovim github-cli wireplumber brightnessctl playerctl ttf-firacode-nerd ttf-noto-nerd; do pacman -Q "$x" &>/dev/null || printf '%s ' "$x"; done); [ -z "$s" ] && [ -z "$p" ] && exit 0; m="Stowage health:"; [ -n "$s" ] && m="$m uninitialized submodules: ${s};"; [ -n "$p" ] && m="$m missing packages: ${p};"; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"%s offer to fix with git submodule update --init or sudo pacman -S."}}' "$m"
